g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is saved after training in the DVC pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What files does FastAPI need to serve predictions?')
sendPrompt('How does FastAPI load the trained model at startup?')
sendPrompt('What endpoints does the FastAPI app expose?')
sendPrompt('What does a JSON prediction request look like?')
sendPrompt('What does Pydantic validation do in FastAPI?')
sendPrompt('What does a FastAPI prediction response look like?')
sendPrompt('What is prediction logging in FastAPI?')
